action_distribution.summary: Button/no-button imbalance is computed from full eval metrics.

token_vocabulary.summary: Categorical action vocabulary and metric-token compatibility are computed from checkpoint metadata.

fdm.metric_compatibility_note: Current metric helper counts left/right/middle mouse buttons; X1/X2 tokens are present in the model vocabulary and need explicit accounting if D2E labels use them.

idm.metric_compatibility_note: Current metric helper counts left/right/middle mouse buttons; X1/X2 tokens are present in the model vocabulary and need explicit accounting if D2E labels use them.

label_prediction_alignment.summary: FDM is compared against the IDM teacher used for pseudo-labeling.

no_op_thresholding.summary: No-button false-positive control is diagnosed from calibration metadata and renewed gate results.

heldout_split_confusion.summary: Split-level confusion endpoints are computed from G004 split statistical comparisons.

per_game_confusion.summary: Per-game confusion requires streaming PVC-resident prediction/target rows; local target game counts and external artifact proofs are recorded until the raw diagnostic artifact is present.

oracle_upper_bound_sanity.summary: Ground-truth target rows define a trivial oracle upper bound; the current model misses nearly every exact token set.

d2e_metric_compatibility.summary: Metric schema and known token-prefix handling are explicit before comparing against paper/released baselines.

feature_sufficiency.summary: Existing compact summary-grid features have weak action metrics despite full-corpus training.

ranked_root_causes.implication: The current FDM fires mouse buttons on no-button frames far too often; thresholding and objective design must be fixed before larger reruns.
FDM training labels come from an IDM whose action quality is far below the renewed IDM target.
The old completed FDM is not a weak pass; it fails every renewed aggregate and split hard gate.
A single global category threshold is not controlling the highly imbalanced no-button prior.
Per-game confusion must be computed on PVC rows before interpreting heldout-game improvements.
The existing aux candidate should be demoted unless a later renewed ablation proves positive D2E heldout movement.

next_actions.action: Run the G002 raw diagnostic streamer on PVC prediction/target rows before interpreting per-game heldout failures.
Do not scale FDM until IDM keyboard/mouse-button/mouse-move quality beats D2E paper/released G-IDM targets.
Use no-button prior losses, asymmetric thresholds, abstention, and per-head calibration in FDM exploration.

claim_boundary: G002 diagnoses why current artifacts fail renewed gates. A pass does not claim the model is good; it proves the failure modes and raw-artifact gaps are explicitly ranked before new GPU-heavy training.
